mapper.insert: insert into `order` ( price, order_time, recruitment_id, status, start_time, end_time, employer_id, employee_id, province_code, province_name, city_code, city_name, district_code, district_name, detail, total, days, order_number, pay_method, pay_status, cancel_reason, rejection_reason, cancel_time, payment_time, rejection_time, refund_time, cancel_type, held_amount,refund_number ) values ( #{price}, #{orderTime}, #{recruitmentId}, #{status}, #{startTime}, #{endTime}, #{employerId}, #{employeeId}, #{provinceCode}, #{provinceName}, #{cityCode}, #{cityName}, #{districtCode}, #{districtName}, #{detail}, #{total}, #{days}, #{orderNumber}, #{payMethod}, #{payStatus}, #{cancelReason}, #{rejectionReason}, #{cancelTime}, #{paymentTime}, #{rejectionTime}, #{refundTime}, #{cancelType}, #{heldAmount},#{refundNumber} )
mapper.select:
select * from `order`
(employer_id = #{userId} or employee_id = #{userId})
and status = #{status}
order by order_time desc
